name: Flame Tiger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>焔虎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フレイム・タイガー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Draw Phase, if this card is in your Graveyard and you control no monsters, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, banish it when it leaves the field.
mnst_eff: During your Draw Phase, if this card is in your Graveyard and you control no monsters, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, banish it when it leaves the field.
eff: During your Draw Phase, if this card is in your Graveyard and you control no monsters, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, banish it when it leaves the field.

sets.set: Onslaught of the Fire Kings Structure Deck
Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
